mapper.select: SELECT mp.point_no AS pointNo, mp.member_no AS memberNo, m.member_id AS memberId, m.name AS name, mp.order_no AS orderNo, mp.point_type AS pointType, mp.point_value AS pointValue, mp.balance_point AS balancePoint, mp.reason AS reason, mp.expire_date AS expireDate, mp.reg_date AS regDate FROM member_point mp LEFT JOIN member m ON mp.member_no = m.member_no ORDER BY mp.point_no DESC

SELECT point_no AS pointNo, member_no AS memberNo, order_no AS orderNo, point_type AS pointType, point_value AS pointValue, balance_point AS balancePoint, reason, expire_date AS expireDate, reg_date AS regDate FROM member_point WHERE point_no=#{pointNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_point(member_no, order_no, point_type, point_value, balance_point, reason, expire_date, reg_date) VALUES(#{memberNo}, #{orderNo}, #{pointType}, #{pointValue}, #{balancePoint}, #{reason}, #{expireDate}, NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT mp.point_no AS pointNo, mp.member_no AS memberNo, m.member_id AS memberId, m.name AS name, mp.order_no AS orderNo, mp.point_type AS pointType, mp.point_value AS pointValue, mp.balance_point AS balancePoint, mp.reason AS reason, mp.expire_date AS expireDate, mp.reg_date AS regDate FROM member_point mp LEFT JOIN member m ON mp.member_no = m.member_no
m.member_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mp.reason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
( m.member_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR mp.reason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY mp.point_no DESC

SELECT mp.point_no AS pointNo, mp.member_no AS memberNo, m.member_id AS memberId, m.name AS name, mp.order_no AS orderNo, mp.point_type AS pointType, mp.point_value AS pointValue, mp.balance_point AS balancePoint, mp.reason AS reason, mp.expire_date AS expireDate, mp.reg_date AS regDate FROM member_point mp LEFT JOIN member m ON mp.member_no = m.member_no ORDER BY mp.point_no DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT mp.point_no AS pointNo, mp.member_no AS memberNo, m.member_id AS memberId, m.name AS name, mp.order_no AS orderNo, mp.point_type AS pointType, mp.point_value AS pointValue, mp.balance_point AS balancePoint, mp.reason AS reason, mp.expire_date AS expireDate, mp.reg_date AS regDate FROM member_point mp LEFT JOIN member m ON mp.member_no = m.member_no
m.member_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mp.reason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
( m.member_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR mp.reason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY mp.point_no DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_point mp LEFT JOIN member m ON mp.member_no = m.member_no

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_point mp LEFT JOIN member m ON mp.member_no = m.member_no
m.member_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mp.reason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
( m.member_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR mp.reason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
mapper.update: UPDATE member_point SET point_type = 'REVOKED' WHERE point_no = #{pointNo} AND point_type != 'REVOKED'
